scripts.application-submission:smoke: npm run build && k6 run -e ITERATIONS=1 -e VIRTUAL_USERS=1 ./dist/application-submission.test.js
scripts.application-submission:stress: npm run build && k6 run -e ITERATIONS=5000 -e VIRTUAL_USERS=200 ./dist/application-submission.test.js
scripts.application-submitted:smoke: npm run build && k6 run -e ITERATIONS=2 -e NUMBER_OF_STUDENTS=2 ./dist/application-submitted.test.js
scripts.application-submitted:stress: npm run build && k6 run -e ITERATIONS=1000 -e NUMBER_OF_STUDENTS=1000 ./dist/application-submitted.test.js
